allow: Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('data/skills.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\(typeof d, Array.isArray\(d\), Object.keys\(d\).slice\(0,5\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('data/skills.json','utf8'\)\); const skills = d.skills; const ts = skills.find\(s=>s.canonical.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('typescript'\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(ts,null,2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('data/skills.json','utf8'\)\); const skills = d.skills; ['Express', 'Flask', 'Go', 'Remix', 'Regression', 'Data Wrangling', 'A/B Testing'].forEach\(name => { const s = skills.find\(s=>s.canonical.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(name.toLowerCase\(\)\)\); if\(s\) console.log\(name,':', JSON.stringify\({canonical:s.canonical,aliases:s.aliases,guardWords:s.guardWords}\)\) }\)")
